intended_use_full: RAPID ICH is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of non-enhanced head CT images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and trained radiologists in workflow triage by flagging and communication of suspected positive Intracranial Hemorrhage (ICH) findings in head CT images.
ground_truth: Reader truthing of retrospective case data (approximately equal number of positive and negative cases)
